The saved template is sent with demo val: The saved template is sent with demo values and a safe example URL.
The selected asynchronous mode has not p: The selected asynchronous mode has not passed its support test. Switch to synchronous mode.
The selected asynchronous mode is not su: The selected asynchronous mode is not supported by this server. Synchronous delivery remains active.
The selected game server is unavailable.
The selected GameServer driver does not: The selected GameServer driver does not support public statistics.
The selected page and all its translatio: The selected page and all its translations will be permanently deleted.
The selected world determines the LoginS: The selected world determines the LoginServer where the account will be created.
The sender email address is invalid.
The server completed the selected mode t: The server completed the selected mode test successfully.
The server successfully executed a Larav: The server successfully executed a Laravel background task.
The server will be removed from settings: The server will be removed from settings and the public website. This action cannot be undone.
The server “<strong data-game-server-del: The server “” will be removed from settings and the default theme. This action cannot be undone.
The setting applies to all game servers. Administrators will continue to see the online count.
The setup is not enabled until this code: The setup is not enabled until this code is verified.
The setup session expired. Start two-fac: The setup session expired. Start two-factor authentication setup again.
The sign-in request expired. Please try: The sign-in request expired. Please try again.
The site account is not a Lineage II gam: The site account is not a Lineage II game account. Game accounts will be connected separately.
The site administration has temporarily: The site administration has temporarily disabled new account registration.
The slug field does not match the theme: The slug field does not match the theme directory name.
The system notification email is invalid: The system notification email is invalid.
The test does not send an email.
The test email address is invalid.
The test email could not be sent. Check: The test email could not be sent. Check SMTP and try again.
The test email could not be sent. Check the server, port, encryption, username and password.
The test may take up to one minute and d: The test may take up to one minute and does not send an email.
The test uses saved settings. Run it aga: The test uses saved settings. Run it again after any SMTP change.
The theme is incompatible with the curre: The theme is incompatible with the current CMS version.
The theme.json file contains invalid JSO: The theme.json file contains invalid JSON.
The theme.json file must contain a JSON: The theme.json file must contain a JSON object.
The theme.json file was not found.
The title shown in the news list and on: The title shown in the news list and on the publication page.
The user can access the account area onl: The user can access the account area only after opening the link from the email.
The user cannot access the account area. Enabling restores access without changing the password.
The user email is already verified.
The user has no linked game accounts yet: The user has no linked game accounts yet.
The user status did not change.
The user waits until SMTP accepts the em: The user waits until SMTP accepts the email. No additional server support is required.
The username may contain Latin letters,: The username may contain Latin letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.
The username must be at least 3 characte: The username must be at least 3 characters.
The username must not exceed 32 characte: The username must not exceed 32 characters.
The verification email could not be sent: The verification email could not be sent. Check the audit log and mail settings.
The verification email was sent again.
The version is read from the <code>VERSI: The version is read from the VERSION file in the project root.
Theme preview: :name: Theme preview: :name
Theme public assets were not found.
There are no expired records to delete.
There is nothing to delete yet. Audit en: There is nothing to delete yet. Audit entries become eligible after :audit days, and administrator sign-in entries after :login days.
These accounts belong to the website onl: These accounts belong to the website only. Lineage II game accounts are created separately.
These fields are not saved or used by th: These fields are not saved or used by the CMS yet.
These rules apply to accounts created by: These rules apply to accounts created by players from the separate player account interface.
This administrator has not enabled two-f: This administrator has not enabled two-factor authentication.
This email address is already in use.
This game login is already linked to a C: This game login is already linked to a CMS account.
This is a test email from KaevCMS.
This is the default information page of: This is the default information page of the theme. Its content will be editable in the CMS later.
This is the last GameServer connected to: This is the last GameServer connected to LoginServer :name.
This operation deletes only records olde: This operation deletes only records older than the configured retention periods and cannot be undone.
This section does not contain any record: This section does not contain any records yet.
This section manages CMS users only. It: This section manages CMS users only. It does not create or modify Login Server accounts.
This setting affects only your administr: This setting affects only your administrator account.
This text is shown in the dark header of: This text is shown in the dark header of the standard email layout.
Title: Title
To install a player account theme, copy: To install a player account theme, copy its Blade package to account-themes/<slug> and public assets to public/account-themes/<slug>. The CMS validates the manifest and compatibility before activation.
Too many password change attempts. Try a: Too many password change attempts. Try again later.
Too many sign-in attempts. Try again in: Too many sign-in attempts. Try again in :seconds seconds.
Two-factor authentication data cannot be: Two-factor authentication data cannot be decrypted. Contact the server owner.
Two-factor authentication is already dis: Two-factor authentication is already disabled for this administrator.
Up to 25 recent records where the user i: Up to 25 recent records where the user is the actor or target.
Use 3 to 40 lowercase Latin letters, num: Use 3 to 40 lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and single hyphens. Leave the suffix empty to use /admin.
Use a separate CMS administrator account: Use a separate CMS administrator account. A game account cannot be used here.
Use a unique login that you do not use o: Use a unique login that you do not use on other projects.
Use only lowercase Latin letters, number: Use only lowercase Latin letters, numbers, and single hyphens.
Use the login or email of your site acco: Use the login or email of your site account.
Use the selected LoginServer database pa: Use the selected LoginServer database parameters
Used for old links, new users and conten: Used for old links, new users and content fallback.
Used for scheduled news publication and: Used for scheduled news publication and date display.
Used in the browser title, header and pu: Used in the browser title, header and public pages.
Used on the home page and in the descrip: Used on the home page and in the description meta tag.
Used to check whether the GameServer pro: Used to check whether the GameServer process is actually listening. Leave the host empty to use the database host.
Used to check whether the LoginServer pr: Used to check whether the LoginServer process is actually listening. Leave the host empty to use the database host.
Used when a page, news item or mail temp: Used when a page, news item or mail template has no translation.
User :name: User :name
Username and password or an application: Username and password or an application password.
Usually contains link expiry or security: Usually contains link expiry or security information.

Versions, environment and KaevCMS compon: Versions, environment and KaevCMS component status.
Waiting for Laravel Scheduler or a queue: Waiting for Laravel Scheduler or a queue worker to process the database test job...
Waiting for the asynchronous process to: Waiting for the asynchronous process to confirm execution...
Waiting for the background process to co: Waiting for the background process to confirm execution...
Website account details and recent relat: Website account details and recent related audit events.
Website registration is temporarily disa: Website registration is temporarily disabled by the administration.
Website text, logo, favicon, time zone,: Website text, logo, favicon, time zone, mail and languages.
Welcome, :name: Welcome, :name
When an asynchronous mode is selected fo: When an asynchronous mode is selected for the first time, KaevCMS runs a real capability test before enabling it.
Without this option the news will be sav: Without this option the news will be saved as a draft.
Without this option the page is saved as: Without this option the page is saved as a draft and is unavailable to visitors.
You can use one unused recovery code if: You can use one unused recovery code if the authenticator app is unavailable.
You cannot disable your own account.
You have reached the game account limit.
You may use <code>**bold text**</code> a: You may use **bold text** and *italic*. HTML tags are blocked.
You signed out of the control panel.
Your current password is required when c: Your current password is required when changing your own account.
Your game worlds, accounts and character: Your game worlds, accounts and characters are collected in one place.
Administrator address and server status: Administrator address and server status refresh settings.
General system and public website settin: General system and public website settings.
Public website content, branding and tim: Public website content, branding and time zone.
Full access to the entire CMS, critical: Full access to the entire CMS, critical settings, owners and future modules.
Manages the CMS and its working sections: Manages the CMS and its working sections, but cannot manage owners or critical settings.
Works only with news, pages and content: Works only with news, pages and content images.
Your role allows viewing this section, b: Your role allows viewing this section, but changes are unavailable.
Only an owner can change the administrat: Only an owner can change the administrator panel address.
The last active owner cannot be disabled: The last active owner cannot be disabled.
The last active owner cannot be assigned: The last active owner cannot be assigned another role.
Your role cannot manage this account.
Your role cannot change the status of th: Your role cannot change the status of this account.
Create a control panel account and choos: Create a control panel account and choose its access role.
Control panel accounts with role-based a: Control panel accounts with role-based access.
Roles limit which control panel sections: Roles limit which control panel sections and actions are available to each account.
Edit account details, role, password and: Edit account details, role, password and status.
Some TRUSTED_PROXIES entries are invalid: Some TRUSTED_PROXIES entries are invalid and were ignored.
Use TRUSTED_PROXIES=* only when the web: Use TRUSTED_PROXIES=* only when the web server cannot be reached directly.
This is normal unless the site is behind: This is normal unless the site is behind Cloudflare or another reverse proxy.
SQLite is intended for local development: SQLite is intended for local development and testing. Use MySQL or MariaDB for a public site.
SQLite is being used in production.
A permanent database queue worker is not: A permanent database queue worker is not required.
Database queue processing depends on Sch: Database queue processing depends on Scheduler or a permanent queue worker.
Database queue jobs have been waiting fo: Database queue jobs have been waiting for more than two minutes without recent processing activity.
Laravel Scheduler has not recorded a suc: Laravel Scheduler has not recorded a successful run yet.
Laravel Scheduler has not run for more t: Laravel Scheduler has not run for more than three minutes.
No Scheduler or queue problems detected.
Queue tables are missing or cannot be re: Queue tables are missing or cannot be read.
Run php artisan schedule:run every minut: Run php artisan schedule:run every minute on the server.
Scheduler and the database queue require: Scheduler and the database queue require attention.
Scheduler is running, but the database q: Scheduler is running, but the database queue has no recent processing activity.
Scheduler is running. Queue activity wil: Scheduler is running. Queue activity will appear after the first database job.
Scheduler, queues and jobs that require: Scheduler, queues and jobs that require administrator attention.
Server availability, mail delivery and s: Server availability, mail delivery and system operations.
A queue worker restart is required to lo: A queue worker restart is required to load the latest application settings.
A restart is required because a previous: A restart is required because a previously active worker may still use old application settings.
Database queue status, failed jobs and s: Database queue status, failed jobs and service data retention.
Database queue worker could not be start: Database queue worker could not be started: :error
Database queue worker exited with code :: Database queue worker exited with code :code.
Heartbeat data is updated when a databas: Heartbeat data is updated when a database job starts, succeeds or fails.
Jobs that exhaust all retry attempts wil: Jobs that exhaust all retry attempts will appear here.
No database queue activity has been reco: No database queue activity has been recorded yet.
No database queue jobs are waiting.
Only completed mail records, expired fai: Only completed mail records, expired failed jobs and inactive per-queue heartbeats are removed automatically.
Only safe metadata is shown. Queue paylo: Only safe metadata is shown. Queue payloads and full exception messages remain hidden.
Queue processing is available. The first: Queue processing is available. The first successful result has not been recorded yet.
Restart the queue worker so it loads the: Restart the queue worker so it loads the latest application settings.
Scheduler starts short-lived workers aut: Scheduler starts short-lived workers automatically. A permanent worker can still be used for lower latency.
The CMS processes every database queue c: The CMS processes every database queue currently containing jobs. Payloads and exception texts are never displayed here.
The failed job could not be returned to: The failed job could not be returned to the queue.
The failed job record was deleted.
The failed job was returned to the queue: The failed job was returned to the queue.
The job will not be retried and the fail: The job will not be retried and the failed record will be permanently deleted.
The queue restart signal could not be se: The queue restart signal could not be sent.
The queue restart signal was sent. A new: The queue restart signal was sent. A new worker will load the current settings.
Use the restart action after changing SM: Use the restart action after changing SMTP or other settings loaded when a permanent worker starts.
Generate APP_KEY before saving encrypted: Generate APP_KEY before saving encrypted passwords or enabling administrator 2FA.
